verses.latin_vulgate: Intellectus Asaph.   Ut quid, Deus, repulisti in finem,  iratus est furor tuus super oves pascuæ tuæ ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַשְׂכִּ֗יל לְאָ֫סָ֥ף לָמָ֣ה אֱ֭לֹהִים זָנַ֣חְתָּ לָנֶ֑צַח יֶעְשַׁ֥ן אַ֝פְּךָ֗ בְּצֹ֣אן מַרְעִיתֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: O God, why hast thou cast us off for ever? why doth thine anger smoke against the sheep of thy pasture?

verses.latin_vulgate: Memor esto congregationis tuæ,  quam possedisti ab initio.  Redemisti virgam hæreditatis tuæ,  mons Sion, in quo habitasti in eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זְכֹ֤ר עֲדָתְךָ֨ ׀ קָ֘נִ֤יתָ קֶּ֗דֶם גָּ֭אַלְתָּ שֵׁ֣בֶט נַחֲלָתֶ֑ךָ הַר־צִ֝יּ֗וֹן זֶ֤ה ׀ שָׁכַ֬נְתָּ בּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Remember thy congregation, which thou hast purchased of old; the rod of thine inheritance, which thou hast redeemed; this mount Zion, wherein thou hast dwelt.

verses.latin_vulgate: Leva manus tuas in superbias eorum in finem :  quanta malignatus est inimicus in sancto !
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָרִ֣ימָה פְ֭עָמֶיךָ לְמַשֻּׁא֣וֹת נֶ֑צַח כׇּל־הֵרַ֖ע אוֹיֵ֣ב בַּקֹּֽדֶשׁ׃
verses.king_james: Lift up thy feet unto the perpetual desolations; even all that the enemy hath done wickedly in the sanctuary.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et gloriati sunt qui oderunt te in medio solemnitatis tuæ ;  posuerunt signa sua, signa :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁאֲג֣וּ צֹ֭רְרֶיךָ בְּקֶ֣רֶב מוֹעֲדֶ֑ךָ שָׂ֖מוּ אוֹתֹתָ֣ם אֹתֽוֹת׃
verses.king_james: Thine enemies roar in the midst of thy congregations; they set up their ensigns for signs.

verses.latin_vulgate: et non cognoverunt sicut in exitu super summum.  Quasi in silva lignorum securibus
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִ֭וָּדַע כְּמֵבִ֣יא לְמָ֑עְלָה בִּסְבׇךְ־עֵ֝֗ץ קַרְדֻּמּֽוֹת׃
verses.king_james: A man was famous according as he had lifted up axes upon the thick trees.

verses.latin_vulgate: exciderunt januas ejus in idipsum ;  in securi et ascia dejecerunt eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: (ועת) [וְ֭עַתָּה] פִּתּוּחֶ֣יהָ יָּ֑חַד בְּכַשִּׁ֥יל וְ֝כֵילַפּ֗וֹת יַהֲלֹמֽוּן׃
verses.king_james: But now they break down the carved work thereof at once with axes and hammers.

verses.latin_vulgate: Incenderunt igni sanctuarium tuum ;  in terra polluerunt tabernaculum nominis tui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁלְח֣וּ בָ֭אֵשׁ מִקְדָּשֶׁ֑ךָ לָ֝אָ֗רֶץ חִלְּל֥וּ מִֽשְׁכַּן־שְׁמֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: They have cast fire into thy sanctuary, they have defiled by casting down the dwelling place of thy name to the ground.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixerunt in corde suo cognatio eorum simul :  Quiescere faciamus omnes dies festos Dei a terra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָמְר֣וּ בְ֭לִבָּם נִינָ֣ם יָ֑חַד שָׂרְפ֖וּ כׇל־מוֹעֲדֵי־אֵ֣ל בָּאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: They said in their hearts, Let us destroy them together: they have burned up all the synagogues of God in the land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Signa nostra non vidimus ;  jam non est propheta ;  et nos non cognoscet amplius.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֽוֹתֹתֵ֗ינוּ לֹ֥א־רָ֫אִ֥ינוּ אֵֽין־ע֥וֹד נָבִ֑יא וְלֹֽא־אִ֝תָּ֗נוּ יֹדֵ֥עַ עַד־מָֽה׃
verses.king_james: We see not our signs: there is no more any prophet: neither is there among us any that knoweth how long.

verses.latin_vulgate: Usquequo, Deus, improperabit inimicus ?  irritat adversarius nomen tuum in finem ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַד־מָתַ֣י אֱ֭לֹהִים יְחָ֣רֶף צָ֑ר יְנָ֘אֵ֤ץ אוֹיֵ֖ב שִׁמְךָ֣ לָנֶֽצַח׃
verses.king_james: O God, how long shall the adversary reproach? shall the enemy blaspheme thy name for ever?

verses.latin_vulgate: Ut quid avertis manum tuam,  et dexteram tuam de medio sinu tuo in finem ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָ֤מָּה תָשִׁ֣יב יָ֭דְךָ וִימִינֶ֑ךָ מִקֶּ֖רֶב (חוקך) [חֵיקְךָ֣] כַלֵּֽה׃
verses.king_james: Why withdrawest thou thy hand, even thy right hand? pluck it out of thy bosom.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus autem rex noster ante sæcula :  operatus est salutem in medio terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וֵ֭אלֹהִים מַלְכִּ֣י מִקֶּ֑דֶם פֹּעֵ֥ל יְ֝שׁוּע֗וֹת בְּקֶ֣רֶב הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: For God is my King of old, working salvation in the midst of the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu confirmasti in virtute tua mare ;  contribulasti capita draconum in aquis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַתָּ֤ה פוֹרַ֣רְתָּ בְעׇזְּךָ֣ יָ֑ם שִׁבַּ֥רְתָּ רָאשֵׁ֥י תַ֝נִּינִ֗ים עַל־הַמָּֽיִם׃
verses.king_james: Thou didst divide the sea by thy strength: thou brakest the heads of the dragons in the waters.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu confregisti capita draconis ;  dedisti eum escam populis Æthiopum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַתָּ֣ה רִ֭צַּצְתָּ רָאשֵׁ֣י לִוְיָתָ֑ן תִּתְּנֶ֥נּוּ מַ֝אֲכָ֗ל לְעָ֣ם לְצִיִּֽים׃
verses.king_james: Thou brakest the heads of leviathan in pieces, and gavest him to be meat to the people inhabiting the wilderness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu dirupisti fontes et torrentes ;  tu siccasti fluvios Ethan.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַתָּ֣ה בָ֭קַעְתָּ מַעְיָ֣ן וָנָ֑חַל אַתָּ֥ה ה֝וֹבַ֗שְׁתָּ נַהֲר֥וֹת אֵיתָֽן׃
verses.king_james: Thou didst cleave the fountain and the flood: thou driedst up mighty rivers.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tuus est dies, et tua est nox ;  tu fabricatus es auroram et solem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְךָ֣ י֭וֹם אַף־לְךָ֥ לָ֑יְלָה אַתָּ֥ה הֲ֝כִינ֗וֹתָ מָא֥וֹר וָשָֽׁמֶשׁ׃
verses.king_james: The day is thine, the night also is thine: thou hast prepared the light and the sun.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu fecisti omnes terminos terræ ;  æstatem et ver tu plasmasti ea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַתָּ֣ה הִ֭צַּבְתָּ כׇּל־גְּבוּל֣וֹת אָ֑רֶץ קַ֥יִץ וָ֝חֹ֗רֶף אַתָּ֥ה יְצַרְתָּֽם׃
verses.king_james: Thou hast set all the borders of the earth: thou hast made summer and winter.

verses.latin_vulgate: Memor esto hujus : inimicus improperavit Domino,  et populus insipiens incitavit nomen tuum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זְכׇר־זֹ֗את א֭וֹיֵב חֵרֵ֣ף ׀ יְהֹוָ֑ה וְעַ֥ם נָ֝בָ֗ל נִאֲצ֥וּ שְׁמֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: Remember this, that the enemy hath reproached, O Lord, and that the foolish people have blasphemed thy name.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ne tradas bestiis animas confitentes tibi,  et animas pauperum tuorum ne obliviscaris in finem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַל־תִּתֵּ֣ן לְ֭חַיַּת נֶ֣פֶשׁ תּוֹרֶ֑ךָ חַיַּ֥ת עֲ֝נִיֶּ֗יךָ אַל־תִּשְׁכַּ֥ח לָנֶֽצַח׃
verses.king_james: O deliver not the soul of thy turtledove unto the multitude of the wicked: forget not the congregation of thy poor for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Respice in testamentum tuum,  quia repleti sunt qui obscurati sunt terræ domibus iniquitatum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַבֵּ֥ט לַבְּרִ֑ית כִּ֥י מָלְא֥וּ מַחֲשַׁכֵּי־אֶ֝֗רֶץ נְא֣וֹת חָמָֽס׃
verses.king_james: Have respect unto the covenant: for the dark places of the earth are full of the habitations of cruelty.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ne avertatur humilis factus confusus ;  pauper et inops laudabunt nomen tuum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַל־יָשֹׁ֣ב דַּ֣ךְ נִכְלָ֑ם עָנִ֥י וְ֝אֶבְי֗וֹן יְֽהַלְל֥וּ שְׁמֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: O let not the oppressed return ashamed: let the poor and needy praise thy name.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exsurge, Deus, judica causam tuam ;  memor esto improperiorum tuorum,  eorum quæ ab insipiente sunt tota die.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קוּמָ֣ה אֱ֭לֹהִים רִיבָ֣ה רִיבֶ֑ךָ זְכֹ֥ר חֶרְפָּתְךָ֥ מִנִּי־נָ֝בָ֗ל כׇּל־הַיּֽוֹם׃
verses.king_james: Arise, O God, plead thine own cause: remember how the foolish man reproacheth thee daily.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ne obliviscaris voces inimicorum tuorum :  superbia eorum qui te oderunt ascendit semper.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַל־תִּ֭שְׁכַּח ק֣וֹל צֹרְרֶ֑יךָ שְׁא֥וֹן קָ֝מֶ֗יךָ עֹלֶ֥ה תָמִֽיד׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Forget not the voice of thine enemies: the tumult of those that rise up against thee increaseth continually.
